scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --reload-dir . --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.graph: echo Graph generation requires graphify-codebase package. Install with: npm install -g graphify-codebase
